_comment: Replay fan-out: drive several fixtures from the ONE capture in replay/odds-capture.json.
Lane 0 is the capture as recorded (no offset, no shift) — the genuine Spain v Argentina line.
The other lanes are DERIVED from the same recording: they enter the capture at a different
point (offsetSec) and are shifted/detuned (shiftPct + a slow drift) so each card has its own
level and its own shape instead of four identical charts. They are labelled as replay in the
UI ('Replaying captured TxLINE data'). Fixture ids are the real World Cup ids already seeded
on-chain, so the markets and settlement path are the real ones.
offsetSec: seconds into the capture this lane starts (capture span is ~278s).
shiftPct: constant offset applied to the first outcome's demargined %, mirrored onto the rest.
driftPct / driftPeriodSec: slow sine on top of the shift, so lanes don't move in lockstep.
kickoffAgoMin: how long ago this fixture kicked off, so the board classifies it in-play.
